## Add New Skill(s)

### Source

- **Repo**: <!-- e.g. https://github.com/author/repo -->
- **Author**: <!-- GitHub username -->
- **License**: <!-- MIT / Apache 2.0 / PolyForm / etc. -->
- **Skills added**: <!-- e.g. author--skill-name (list all) -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Skill directory follows `{author}--{skill-name}/` naming convention
- [ ] SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter with `name` and `description` fields
- [ ] Source repo added to `sources.json`
- [ ] Skill added to the correct phase in `skills-index.json` (if adding routing)
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing skill (check the [priority table](skills/_router/SKILL.md) for overlaps)
- [ ] License is compatible and noted in README if non-MIT
- [ ] `./sync.sh --check` runs without errors

### Why

<!-- Brief: what does this skill add that we don't already have? -->
